customVoice.title: <a:vocal:1269193877571764265> Voice Channel Options
customVoice.description: Ah, look who's here. I hope your intelligence is advanced enough to understand how to use the buttons below. Otherwise, I suppose I should expect disappointing results, shouldn't I? Yes, I'm talking about you, {members}.
customVoice.footer: Use the buttons below to modify the settings.

setup.title: 📢 Custom Voice Channel Creation Setup
setup.description: Please select the custom voice channel creation channel to use.
setup.success: The custom voice channel has been successfully configured on channel {channel}.

error.noPermission: You cannot modify the permissions of this voice channel.
error.updateFailed: An error occurred while updating the permissions.
error.channelNotFound: <:false:1304519593083011093> The selected channel was not found.
